name: sixth-sense
description: Marketplace for Sixth Sense, a fork of obra/superpowers that adds model/effort routing, stack-aware conventions, and a two-pass adversarial reviewer (Dylan Dog).

plugins.name: sixth-sense
plugins.description: Catches bugs before they ship, and blocked features before they're built: per-task model/effort routing, stack-aware TDD (Java, Angular, React/Next.js, Python), and a two-pass adversarial reviewer (Dylan Dog). A fork of obra/superpowers.
